steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The word “coincided” explicitly means the two broods arrived simultaneously. The blank must name the phenomenon of two separate things with different cycles meeting at the same moment—an event so rare it happens only once every 221 years.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Convergence directly names the coming together of two distinct things. The other three choices describe a sequence (succession), separation (division), or termination (expiration)—none fit the scenario. That matches choice C — C is correct.
